title: Codex support is documented
summary: linux-admin now documents Codex as a first-class workflow with AGENTS.md, docs/CODEX_USAGE.md, Codex CLI installation, Codex app/IDE/Web guidance, and scoped task templates.
highlights: README now presents linux-admin for Claude Code, Codex, and agent-based ops tools.
New docs/CODEX_USAGE.md explains Codex app, CLI, IDE extension, Web/GitHub task, and /init usage.
AGENTS.md is expanded as the primary Codex instruction file.
Plugin package metadata is aligned to 1.17.54 with 114 expert skills.
